description: Auxiliary control catalog used to enrich generated countermeasures with governance, monitoring, access control, audit, and configuration-management guidance.

mappings.use_in_etm: Enrich countermeasures with least privilege, role separation, and privileged action review.
Enrich countermeasures with monitoring, validation, and integrity checks on external data sources.
Enrich countermeasures with auditability, approval workflows, and change-management controls.

name: NIST SP 800-53 mitigation guidance
usage_guidelines: Use NIST as mitigation guidance, not as an ERC vulnerability source.
Attach NIST control areas to countermeasures when useful for reporting.
Keep smart-contract-specific mitigations from OWASP, EthTrust, and OpenZeppelin as primary technical controls.
